calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-14-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Anthony Harris, Esq. for Plaintiff: Kay Spencer. Court waived plaintiff's appearance. Counsel submitted S.O.D and proof of service as requested by the court.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: An Du Trieu in the total amount $463,161.33.
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-28-2006 Continued To Mar-14-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Anthony Harris, Esq. for Plaintiff: Kay Spencer, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and reviewed of evidence presented, matter is continued to Mar.14, 2006 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for Counsel to submit S.O.D and proof of service, the Court waived Plaintiff personal appearance.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-22-2005 Continued To Feb-28-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong.
William Hanson, Esq. for Plaintiff: Kay Spencer, not presentl.
At Counsel's request in open court for a continuance, matter is continued to Feb. 28, 2006 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for appearance of the Plaintiff and Proof of Service on Statement of Damages.
